headline: Prediction: This Will Be Occidental Petroleum’s Stock Price in 2030
summary: Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) is having a moment. Shares of the Warren Buffett favorite have risen 48.34% year to date, rebounding off late-2025 lows on the back of a $5.8 billion debt reduction, an 8% dividend hike, and a portfolio reset following the OxyChem sale to Berkshire Hathaway. headline: Occidental Petroleum: A New Focus On Shareholder Returns
summary: Occidental Petroleum offers a robust investment case, driven by a transformed asset base and leading Permian production. Find out why OXY stock is a Buy.
